title: Cuneiform Tablet #0001: Old Akkadian Letter
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a letter document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Akkadian period — a letter document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Akkadian period. Letter document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records letter matters typical of Old Akkadian period administrative or literary practice.
